company.name: Bright Path Clinics
company.tech_stack_notes: Currently on a competitor's AI agent platform, unhappy with billing surprises

message: We're currently using another AI automation tool but our bill has doubled twice in the last 3 months due to usage credits and we can't predict costs anymore. Looking for something with more predictable pricing. Can you send over your pricing structure?
budget_indicated: Currently paying ~$400/month, wants predictable pricing at or below that
timeline: Actively comparing options now, wants to switch within 4-6 weeks

past_interactions.notes: Visited pricing page 3 times in one day, downloaded pricing comparison PDF
Submitted contact form directly asking about flat-rate pricing

bant_notes: Clear budget ceiling stated, Dr. Nadeem has purchasing authority as practice admin, strong stated need (pricing predictability), timeline is short and motivated
